title: Session 2: Examples of Derivatives
content:
« Previous | Next »
Overview In this session we apply the main formula for the derivative to the functions 1/x and x^n. We’ll also solve a problem using a derivative and give some alternate notations for writing derivatives.
Lecture Video and Notes Video Excerpts Clip 1: Example 1: y=1/x
Clip 2: Harder Problem: Triangles Under the Graph of y=1/x
Clip 3: Notation for Derivatives
Clip 4: Example 2: y=xn
Worked Example The Derivative of |x|
